query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u."passwordHash", tu.role, t."companyName"
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN "tenantUsers" tu ON u.id = tu."userId"
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON tu."tenantId" = t.id
ORDER BY u.id;
